title: Smelt Gravel for Flint
description: Stop relying on luck. Smelt gravel in a furnace and get flint quickly.
body:
## 🌐 ITITAN Hosting
[![ITITAN Hosting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/3geETR/images/refs/heads/main/Other/ititan.png)](https://ititanhosting.com/game/minecraft)


# **Smelt Gravel for Flint**

Instead of constantly placing and breaking gravel to get flint, just quickly smelt it.


## Quick smelting
![smelting](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeTZmbXFmbXMyZm1qeXdqNDFjbDhmemlrOTkxOXBzNGo5YnBsNnk5eCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Kqk9lizJgAq5Q9V9hh/giphy.gif)


## Furnace & Blast Furnace
![furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa9a74d6215d14de49b1c6146ad758c4f9d6a260_0.webp) ![blast furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5ead32547a8dbb48fa8bc0cbd443f4df2560622_0.webp)


## Version Support
